evidence_direction_note: EXQ-166 PASS 4/6 (2026-03-29): obs_fwd_r2=0.43 (C1 PASS) -- obs-space forward model learns to predict harm_obs_s_next, confirming ARC-033 feasibility and fixing EXQ-115 identity collapse.
